description:
********* It's FREE to book online **********

* A credit card number is required to hold the appointment, but you won't be charged. 

* Please TEXT/EMAIL us to make modification to the appointment before "24 HOURS" window to avoid late cancellation fee ($20-$40).

******* Before Your Appointment *******

* Please have a CLEAN SHAVE on the same day or one day prior to your appointment. 

*Please READ CAREFULLY for the before and after treatment instruction at this link: https://www.baredmonkey.com/f-a-q


Herald Square Text: 551-230-6569; 
Grand Central Text: 551-230-6588;
Email: care@baredmonkey.com
